heading: Step 1: Disconnect each organization you connected to your Workload Identity Provider.
body:
- Click **Organizations** in the left sidebar.

- Click the organization that has Workload Identity Federation enabled.

- Click **Disconnect** under the **Manage** dropdown on the Workload Identity Federation card.

- In the **Disconnect identity provider?** modal, click
  **Disconnect**.

  When you disconnect an IdP (Identity Provider), users who authenticate using the
  IdP (Identity Provider) lose access to Workload Identity Federation in the Atlas projects
  listed in the **Project** table.
